sentences.arabic: أَرَدْنَا تَجْرِبَةَ التَّخْيِيمِ لِأَوَّلِ مَرَّةٍ فَاخْتَرْنَا مَكَانًا فِي الْغَابَةِ.
sentences.translation: Htjeli smo iskusiti kampovanje po prvi put pa smo izabrali mjesto u šumi.
sentences.translationEn: We wanted to experience camping for the first time and chose a spot in the forest.

sentences.arabic: نَصَبْنَا الْخِيَامَ قَبْلَ غُرُوبِ الشَّمْسِ بِصُعُوبَةٍ بَسِيطَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Postavili smo šatore prije zalaska sunca s malo teškoće.
sentences.translationEn: We set up the tents before sunset with a little difficulty.

sentences.translation: Zapalili smo vatru i kuhali hranu na njoj.
sentences.translationEn: We lit a fire and cooked food on it.

sentences.arabic: فِي اللَّيْلِ نَظَرْنَا إِلَى النُّجُومِ وَتَحَدَّثْنَا طَوِيلًا.
sentences.translation: Noću smo gledali zvijezde i dugo razgovarali.
sentences.translationEn: At night we looked at the stars and talked for a long time.

sentences.arabic: اسْتَيْقَظْنَا مَعَ أَصْوَاتِ الطُّيُورِ فِي الصَّبَاحِ الْبَاكِرِ.
sentences.translation: Probudili smo se uz zvukove ptica u rano jutro.
sentences.translationEn: We woke up to the sound of birds in the early morning.
